description: level ground outside building footprint (single layer of dirt)

operations.purpose: level ground outside building footprint (single layer of dirt)
one-block-wide outer planter/border (quartz) flush with ground forming a ring; this covers the same footprint as building footprint edges
raised wooden base band (1 block high) inset inside quartz border; creates inner floor boundary and visible wooden base around house
textured cobblestone band one block high above wooden base around perimeter (middle lower wall band)
continuous strip windows centered in the middle wall band using glass panes; implemented as holes in the wall band rows
white smooth band (use white_terracotta as quartz_alternative) one block high above cobblestone band
upper wood plank band at top of walls (one block high)
stone slab coping/parapet around roof edge (single-slab high boundary)_outline_face_0
stone slab coping/parapet around roof edge (single-slab high boundary)_outline_face_1
stone slab coping/parapet around roof edge (single-slab high boundary)_outline_face_2
stone slab coping/parapet around roof edge (single-slab high boundary)_outline_face_3
stone slab coping/parapet around roof edge (single-slab high boundary)_outline_face_4
recessed flat roof interior: wooden slab floor set one block lower than coping; implemented as filling the interior roof area with slabs sitting at y=5 (matching top band) to appear recessed
entrance opening at front center: 1-block wide opening in quartz border and wall on north side (z=0) to create doorway
clear interior doorway through cobblestone and glass band to create full entrance opening from planter into interior
upper stonebrick coping blocks at full block height immediately inside slab coping to create a capped parapet effect (small raised edge)
clear interior space (empty interior room), leaving floor area at y=1 if desired for internal flooring details
interior floor layer one block above ground using oak planks inset from walls
